hooks.description: Before dispatching any agent, verify the agent's required artifacts exist in the working run directory. If Code Writer is called without component-rules.md and architecture.md present, block the call. Artifacts and consumers are defined in standards/artifact-contracts.md.

After any agent writes output, scan for rule violations: var(--x, fallback) patterns, hardcoded hex colors outside tokens, [UNRESOLVED] markers without GIGO penalty recorded, title-case user-facing strings. Reports to pipeline-state.yaml; does not block — the next Quality Gate consumes the report.

_note: Hook scripts are stubs at v0.1.0. Implementations are tracked in ROADMAP Phase 1. The contract of what they enforce is the deliverable for scaffolding; shell implementations come as each rule is proved in practice.
